だっしゅつボタン.effect: Held: When the holder takes damage from a move, it switches out for a party Pokémon of the Trainer’s choice.

weakness-policy.effect: Held: When the holder is hit by a super effective move, its Attack and Special Attack raise by two stages.

じゃくてんほけん.effect: Held: When the holder is hit by a super effective move, its Attack and Special Attack raise by two stages.

assault-vest.effect: Raises the holder’s Special Defense to 1.5×.  Prevents the holder from selecting a status move.

pixie-plate.effect: Held: Fairy-Type moves from holder do 20% more damage. Changes Arceus’s and Judgment’s type to Fairy.

せいれいプレート.effect: Held: Fairy-Type moves from holder do 20% more damage. Changes Arceus’s and Judgment’s type to Fairy.

luminous-moss.effect: Held: If the holder is hit by a damaging Water move, raises its Special Defense by one stage.

ひかりごけ.effect: Held: If the holder is hit by a damaging Water move, raises its Special Defense by one stage.

snowball.effect: Held: If the holder is hit by a damaging Ice move, raises its Attack by one stage.

ゆきだま.effect: Held: If the holder is hit by a damaging Ice move, raises its Attack by one stage.

safety-goggles.effect: Held: Prevents damage from powder moves and the damage from Hail and Sandstorm.

ぼうじんゴーグル.effect: Held: Prevents damage from powder moves and the damage from Hail and Sandstorm.

roseli-berry.effect: Held: Consumed when struck by a super-effective Fairy-type attack to halve the damage.

ロゼルのみ.effect: Held: Consumed when struck by a super-effective Fairy-type attack to halve the damage.

adrenaline-orb.effect: Makes wild Pokémon more likely to summon allies.  Held: increases the holder’s Speed by one stage when affected by Intimidate.

ビビリだま.effect: Makes wild Pokémon more likely to summon allies.  Held: increases the holder’s Speed by one stage when affected by Intimidate.

terrain-extender.effect: Held: Extends the holder’s Terrain effects to 8 turns.

グランドコート.effect: Held: Extends the holder’s Terrain effects to 8 turns.

protective-pads.effect: Held: Prevents side effects of contact moves used on the holder.

ぼうごパット.effect: Held: Prevents side effects of contact moves used on the holder.

electric-seed.effect: Held: Consumed on Electric Terrain and raises the holder’s Defense by one stage.

エレキシード.effect: Held: Consumed on Electric Terrain and raises the holder’s Defense by one stage.

psychic-seed.effect: Held: Consumed on Psychic Terrain and raises the holder’s Special Defense by one stage.

サイコシード.effect: Held: Consumed on Psychic Terrain and raises the holder’s Special Defense by one stage.

misty-seed.effect: Held: Consumed on Misty Terrain and raises the holder’s Special Defense by one stage.

ミストシード.effect: Held: Consumed on Misty Terrain and raises the holder’s Special Defense by one stage.

grassy-seed.effect: Held: Consumed on Grassy Terrain and raises the holder’s Defense by one stage.

グラスシード.effect: Held: Consumed on Grassy Terrain and raises the holder’s Defense by one stage.
